message:
bd-1xma.3: implement node budget and timeout guards for E-graph saturation

Add budget guards to prevent unbounded resource consumption during crossing
minimization:

- BudgetType enum and BudgetExhausted struct for diagnostics
- SaturationConfig::for_graph() computes limits from §6.6 formulas
- Node budget: min(100k, 50 * |V|²)
- Time budget: min(500ms, 10ms * |layers|)
- Iteration budget: 1000
- Interactive/batch presets for different use cases
- Structured tracing warnings when budgets are exhausted
- SaturationResult.budget_exhausted carries full diagnostics

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
